attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HIER_VER_HEADER.HIERARCHY_VERSION_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HIER_VER_HEADER.HIERARCHY_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HIER_VER_HEADER.HIERARCHY_VERSION_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HIER_VER_HEADER.STATUS, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HIER_VER_HEADER.INITIAL_IMPORT_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HIER_VER_HEADER.INITIAL_IMPORT_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HIER_VER_HEADER.LAST_VALIDATED_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HIER_VER_HEADER.LAST_VALIDATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HIER_VER_HEADER.FINAL_PROCESSED_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HIER_VER_HEADER.FINAL_PROCESSED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HIER_VER_HEADER.ARCHIVED_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HIER_VER_HEADER.ARCHIVED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HIER_VER_HEADER.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HIER_VER_HEADER.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HIER_VER_HEADER.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HIER_VER_HEADER.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HIER_VER_HEADER.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HIER_VER_HEADER.OGG_KEY_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HIER_VER_HEADER.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HIER_VER_HEADER.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HIER_VER_HEADER.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HIER_VER_HEADER.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HIER_VER_HEADER STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HIER_VER_HEADER,
(
select OGG_KEY_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HIER_VER_HEADER
minus
select OGG_KEY_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HIER_VER_HEADER
) ACM
where 
 ACM.OGG_KEY_ID = STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HIER_VER_HEADER.OGG_KEY_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HIER_VER_HEADER.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_HIER_VERSION_HDR)
